items.title: Wasiirkii difaaca Maali oo la dilay iyo xaaladda oo faraha kasii baxaysa
items.description: Bamako (Caasimada Online) – Wasiirkii Gaashaandhigga dalka Maali, Janaraal Sadio Camara ayaa lagu dilay weerarro qorsheysan oo lala beegsaday saldhigyo ciidan oo ku yaalla guud ahaan dalkaas. Warkan ayaa soo baxay maalin uun ka dib markii gurigiisa oo ku yaalla magaalada weyn ee taliska milatariga ee Kati uu la kulmay weerar ku bilowday qaraxyo, xilli ay weerarro isku mar ah fulinayeen kooxo xiriir la leh Al-Qaacida iyo jabhadda Tuareg. Camara ayaa ahaa shaqsi udub-dhexaad u ahaa dowladda milatariga ah ee la wareegtay awoodda kadib inqilaabyadii is-xigay ee dalkaas ka dhacay sanadihii 2020 iyo 2021. Ninkan ayaa ka mid ahaa shaqsiyaadka ugu saameynta badan hoggaanka milatariga ee talada haya, waxaana dadka qaar u arkayeen inuu ahaa shaqsiga mustaqbalka hoggaamin lahaa dalka Maali. Dhimashadiisa ayaa lagu tilmaamay dhabar-jab weyn oo soo gaaray ciidamada qalabka sida ee dalkaas. Kooxaha weerarka soo qaaday ayaa la sheegay inay fuliyeen qarax is-miidaamin ah oo loo adeegsaday gaari, kaas oo lala beegsaday guriga Camara ee Kati. Magaaladan oo si weyn loo ilaaliyo ayaa qiyaastii 15 kilomitir dhanka waqooyi-galbeed kaga beegan caasimadda Bamako, waana halka uu sidoo kale degan yahay Madaxweynaha KMG ah, Assimi Goita. Kati waxaa loo tixgeliyaa mid ka mid ah goobaha ugu ammaanka badan dalka, haddana dagaalyahanno ka tirsan kooxda Jama’at Nusrat al-Islam wal-Muslimin (JNIM) ee xiriirka la leh Al-Qaacida, oo ay weheliyaan dagaalyahannada Tuareg ee ka tirsan Jabhadda Xoreynta Azawad (FLA), ayaa awooday inay soo qaadaan weerarkan. Madaxweyne Goita ayaa la xaqiijiyay inuu nool yahay oo uu caafimaad qabo, isla markaana uu hadda ku sugan yahay goob ammaan ah. Tan ayaa ka dhigan in weli uu gacanta ku hayo taliska milatariga. Kooxaha hubeysan ayaa sii wada weerarrada, iyagoo beegsaday dhowr goobood oo kale oo ku baahsan Maali, oo ay ku jiraan caasimadda Bamako, iyo sidoo kale magaalooyinka Gao iyo Kidal ee dhaca waqooyiga, iyo magaalada Sevare ee bartamaha dalka. Dhawaaqa rasaas culus iyo qaraxyo waaweyn ayaa weli laga maqlayay magaalada Kidal, sida ay xaqiijiyeen dadka deegaanka. Bulama Bukarti, oo ah falanqeeye arrimaha ammaanka iyo siyaasadda, ayaa sheegay inay u badan tahay in “dagaallo hor leh oo loogu jiro gacan-ku-haynta dhulka iyo goobaha istaraatiijiga ah” ay dhici doonaan maalmaha soo socda. Wuxuu sidoo kale iftiimiyay sida kooxaha hubeysan ee horay isku dagaali jiray ay hadda isku biirsadeen si ay u weeraraan cadowgooda guud oo ah dowladda Maali. “Kuwani waa laba kooxood oo u dagaallamaya yoolal kala duwan,” ayuu yiri Bukarti oo la hadlay Al Jazeera. “Laakiin waxay isku yimaadeen sanadkii hore, waxayna sheegeen inay iska kaashan doonaan howl-gallada mustaqbalka, waxaana maalmihii u dambeeyay aan aragnay fulinta rasmiga ah ee heshiiskaas.” Midowga Afrika, Xoghayaha Guud ee Ururka Iskaashiga Islaamka, iyo Xafiiska Arrimaha Afrika ee Mareykanka ayaa dhammaantood si kulul u cambaareeyay weerarradan. The post Wasiirkii difaaca Maali oo la dilay iyo xaaladda oo faraha kasii baxaysa appeared first on Caasimada Online .

Wuxuu sidoo kale iftiimiyay sida kooxaha hubeysan ee horay isku dagaali jiray ay hadda isku biirsadeen si ay u weeraraan cadowgooda guud oo ah dowladda Maali. “Kuwani waa laba kooxood oo u dagaallamaya yoolal kala duwan,” ayuu yiri Bukarti oo la hadlay Al Jazeera. “Laakiin waxay isku yimaadeen sanadkii hore, waxayna sheegeen inay iska kaashan doonaan howl-gallada mustaqbalka, waxaana maalmihii u dambeeyay aan aragnay fulinta rasmiga ah ee heshiiskaas.” Midowga Afrika, Xoghayaha Guud ee Ururka Iskaashiga Islaamka, iyo Xafiiska Arrimaha Afrika ee Mareykanka ayaa dhammaantood si kulul u cambaareeyay weerarradan. The post Wasiirkii difaaca Maali oo la dilay iyo xaaladda oo faraha kasii baxaysa appeared first on Caasimada Online .

items.title: Booliska Maraykanka oo faahfaahin ka bixiyay shaqaaqadii xalay ka  dhacday goob uu ku sugnaa Trump
items.description: Xilli qalalaase amni oo xooggan uu ka dhacay bannaanka hoolka lagu qabanayay casho sanadlaha ah oo lagu magacaabo eWhite House Correspondents’ Association Dinner, kadib markii nin hubeysan uu rasaas ku furay ciidamada amniga ee halkaasi ku sugnaa ayay boolisku dhacdadaas faahfaahin ka bixiyeen. Sida ay sheegeen boolisku Eedeysanaha loo haysto falkan oo watay laba qori iyo mindiyo dhowr ah, ayaa  isku dayay inuu ku dhowaado goobta munaasabadda ka socotay, ka hor inta uusan rasaas bilaabin. Ciidamada ammaanka ayaa si degdeg ah uga falceliyay dhacdada, iyagoo xakameeyay ninkaasi kuna guuleystay inay gacanta ku dhigaan. Dhacdadan ayaa sababtay cabsi iyo jahwareer ballaaran, iyadoo rasaasta la maqlay ay keentay in martidii munaasabadda ay hoos galaan miisaska, halka qaar kalena si degdeg ah looga daadgureeyay goobta. Madaxweynaha Mareykanka, Donald Trump, iyo mas’uuliyiin kale oo sare ayaa si dhaqso ah looga saaray goobta, iyadoo la xaqiijiyay inay badqabaan. Wararka hordhaca ah ayaa tilmaamaya in mid ka mid ah ilaalada Secret Service uu dhaawac fudud soo gaaray, inkastoo jaakadda ka hortagga rasaasta ay ka hortagtay dhaawac halis ah. Saraakiisha ayaa sheegay in weeraryahanku u muuqdo inuu kaligiis falka fuliyay, waxaana hadda socda baaritaanno lagu ogaanayo sababta ka dambeysay weerarka iyo sida uu ugu suurtagashay inuu hub la galo meel si adag loo ilaaliyo. Mas’uuliyiinta ayaa sidoo kale xaqiijiyay in eedeysanaha la horgeyn doono maxkamad, isagoo wajahaya dacwado culus oo la xiriira weerar hubeysan iyo ku xadgudubka ciidamada federaalka.

items.title: Mediterranean Tragedy: 17 Somali Youths Confirmed Dead in Attempted Crossing to Europe
items.description: Mogadishu (WDN ) — A devastating maritime tragedy has claimed the lives of 17 Somali youths in the waters between Algeria and Spain, after a migrant boat reportedly capsized during a perilous attempt to reach Europe. The Federal Government of Somalia confirmed the deaths, describing the incident as one of the most harrowing recent cases linked to irregular migration from the Horn of Africa. According to the Chairman of the Somali Disaster Management Agency, Maxamuud Macalin Cabdulle, the victims include 12 young men and 5 young women, all believed to have been between 18 and 30 years old. Their identities are still being verified, but authorities say they are in possession of photographs and partial information to assist families in recognition. “We are dealing with a deeply painful loss,” he said. “Seventeen young Somalis have died in the sea between Algeria and Spain while attempting to cross. We are currently working to identify them and locate their families.” Officials have urged relatives across Somalia to come forward if they believe their children or siblings may have been among those on board the ill-fated vessel. Behind the numbers lies a familiar and devastating pattern: young Somalis risking everything on overcrowded and unsafe boats, driven by desperation, unemployment, and the hope of reaching Europe through increasingly dangerous migration routes. The latest tragedy underscores the relentless human cost of irregular migration across North Africa and the Mediterranean—routes that continue to claim lives despite repeated warnings, awareness campaigns, and mounting international concern. As identification efforts continue, families across Somalia are left waiting for confirmation—many now confronting the unbearable possibility that their loved ones may never return. WardheerNews The post Mediterranean Tragedy: 17 Somali Youths Confirmed Dead in Attempted Crossing to Europe appeared first on WardheerNews .

items.title: Ciidanka Badbaadada K/G oo laga saaray Baydhaba
items.description: Baydhabo (Caasimada Online) – Wararka naga soo gaaraya gobolka Baay ayaa sheegaya in ciidamada badbaadada Koonfur Galbeed ee dhawaan magaalada Baydhabo ka saaray Cabdicasiis Lafta-gareen maanta dib loogu celiyay degmada Buurhakaba oo markii horeba laga soo qaaday. Ciidamadan oo ka qayb-qaatay howlgalkii ciidamada dowladda ay ku galeen Baydhabo 30-kii Maarso ee sanadkan 2026, ayaa haatan laga saaray gudaha magaalada, si loo xakameeyo dhaq-dhaqaaqyada ciidamada iyo hubka. Mas’uuliyiin ka tirsan Koonfur Galbeed ayaa sheegay in la’isla gartay in ciidamada lagu celiyo xarumahoodii, iyaga oo laga war qabi doono, maadaama ay qabteen howl muhiim ah, ayna ku guuleysteen howlgalkii Baydhabo. Ujeedada ugu wayn ayaa ah in la xadiido ciidamada tirada badan ee jooga magaalada, maadaama la galayo doorasho iyo tartan adag oo isku hayaan dhinacyo kala duwan oo daneynaya hoggaanka Koonfur Galbeed. Horay ciidamadii taabacsanaa Lafta-gareen ayaa isaga baxay magaalada iyo hareeraheeda, iyaga oo gaaray qaybo kamid ah gobolka Gedo ee Jubbaland. Arrinta ayaa kusoo aadeysa xilli maanta gudoomiye Sheekh Aadan Madoobe uu dib ugu laabtay magaalada Baydhabo, isaga oo loo diyaarinayo inuu noqdo musharraxa JSP ku metalaya dooarashada Maamulka Koonfur Galbeed. Wararka ayaa intaas kusii daraya in Xasan Sheekh uu ku qanciyey agaasimihii hore ee Villa Somalia, ahna saaxiib aad ugu dhow, Xuseen Sheekh Maxamuud inuu taratanka uga haro Aadan Madoobe, ayada oo si kale loo qanciyey. Si kastaba, Arrintan ayaa tartanka ka dhigeysa mid aan u muuqan mid furan, gaar ahaan maadaama Baydhabo ay hadda ku jirto marxalad kala-guur ah oo Dowladda Federaalka Soomaaliya ay saameyn xooggan ku leedahay. The post Ciidanka Badbaadada K/G oo laga saaray Baydhaba appeared first on Caasimada Online .

items.title: Weerarkii ugu dambeeyey ee Mali: Wasiirkii Difaaca oo la dilay, dagaallo socda
items.description: Wasiirka Difaaca Mali, Sadio Camara, ayaa lagu dilay weerarro waaweyn oo gilgilay dalka Mali, kuwaas oo lagu beegsaday magaalooyinka Bamako, Kati, Gao iyo Kidal. Weeraradan oo loo arko kuwii ugu xooganaa ee dalkaasi wajahdo sanado badan, ayaa waxaa ka dambeeyay kooxda JNIM ee xiriirka la leh Al-Qaacida iyo fallaagada Azawad Liberation Front (FLA). Wararkii ugu dambeeyay ayaa sheegaya in weerarrada lagu bartilmaameedsaday saldhigyo ciidan, xarumo dowladeed iyo goobo istiraatiiji ah, iyadoo qaraxyo iyo dagaallo culus laga soo sheegayo meelo badan. Sadio Camara ayaa la sheegay inuu ku dhintay weerar lagu qaaday xarun ciidan oo ku taalla Kati. Kooxda JNIM ayaa sheegatay mas’uuliyadda qayb ka mid ah weerarrada, halka FLA ay la wareegtay deegaanno waqooyiga Mali ah, gaar ahaan agagaarka Kidal, taasoo muujinaysay iskaashi cusub oo u dhexeeya kooxaha hubeysan. Dowladda Mali ayaa bilowday hawlgallo jawaab celin ah, iyadoo ciidamo dheeraad ah loo daabulay furimaha dagaalka, halka bandow lagu soo rogay qaybo kamid ah dalka. Xaaladda amni ee Mali ayaa weli aad u kacsan, waxaana jira cabsi laga qabo in weerarradan ay horseedi karaan qalalaase siyaasadeed iyo mid amni oo horleh oo saameeya gobolka Saaxil oo dhan.

items.title: Israel’s cabinet approved first Ambassador to Somaliland
items.description: Israel’s Cabinet on Sunday unanimously approved the appointment of Michael Lotem as the Jewish state’s first ambassador to Somaliland. Lotem, a senior diplomat, was announced as Foreign Minister Gideon Sa’ar’s pick for the post on April 15. Lotem finished a three-year tour as ambassador to Kenya, Uganda, Tanzania, Malawi and the Seychelles in August 2025, and has since served as a non-resident economic ambassador to Africa. He had previously served as ambassador to Azerbaijan and Kazakhstan. “The posting will initially be non-resident. Lotem will be based in Jerusalem rather than in Somaliland, managing the bilateral relationship through visits and direct engagement,” the Somaliland Chronicle reported on April 18. Somalia, which does not recognize Somaliland’s 1991 declaration of independence, reacted angrily, saying it “categorically rejects” any attempt to grant diplomatic or political recognition on any part of what it still considers its territory, the Somali Guardian reported on April 15. “Such actions risk destabilizing regional progress and emboldening divisive narratives,” said Somalia’s Foreign Ministry. In a joint statement on April 18, the foreign ministers of Algeria, Bangladesh, Egypt, Indonesia, Libya, the Palestinian Authority, Saudi Arabia, Somalia, Sudan and Turkey also condemned Israel’s announcement, calling it a “flagrant violation” of Somalia’s sovereignty. Israel became the first country to recognize the self-declared nation of Somaliland on Dec. 26, 2025. “The State of Israel plans to immediately expand its relations with the Republic of Somaliland through extensive cooperation in the fields of agriculture, health, technology and economy,” said Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu. A Sunni-majority country, Somaliland practices tolerance and has expressed support for Israel and the Abraham Accords, the U.S.-brokered 2020 deal between Israel and several Muslim states.

items.title: Somalia and Oman Explore Strengthening Food Security Cooperation
items.description: Muscat, Oman — The Sultanate of Oman and Somalia recently engaged in high-level talks to explore investment opportunities aimed at boosting cooperation and enhancing food security in both nations.

items.title: Farmaajo oo taageeray baaqii Shariif ee uu aqbalay Xasab
items.description: Muqdisho (Caasmada Online) – Madaxweynihii hore ee Soomaaliya, Maxamed Cabdullahi Maxamed (Farmaajo) oo warsaxaafadeed soo saaray ayaa taageeray baaqii shalay kasoo yeeray madaxweyne hore Sheekh Shariif oo shalay dalbaday in la dhex-dhexeediyo iyaga iyo Madaxweynaha, halka dhankiisana Xasan Sheekh uu soo dhaweeyay baaqaas oo la hordhigay odayaasha dhaqanka ee ka qayb-galay caleema saarkii Ugaaska Murusade. Farmaajo ayaa xusay in isaguna uu codkiisa ku biirinayo in la wada-hadlo, isla markaana doorkooda ay qaataan odayaasha dhaqanka, si xal loo gaaro. “Waxaan codkayga ku biirinayaa baaqii shalay uu soo jeediyay madaxweynihii hore Mudane Shariif Sheekh Axmed uuna taageeray Madaxweyne Xasan Sheekh Maxamuud mar ay ka hadlayeen madashii caleema-saarka Ugaas Cabdirisaaq Ugaas Cabdullaahi Ugaas Xaashi oo ahayd madal muujisay baahida ay Soomaalidu u qabto midnimo iyo wadahadal. Baaqa Madaxweynayaasha waxaa uu salka ku hayey kaalinta ay duubabka dhaqanka Soomaaliyeed ee ku kulmay caasimadda dalka ay ka qaadan karaan xal u helidda ismari-waaga siyaasadeed ee dalka ka jira”. ayuu yiri Farmaajo. Sidoo kale, wuxuu intaas sii raaciyay “Haddaba waxaan sidoo kale halkan baaq uga gudbinayaa duubabka Soomaaliyeed inay u istaagaan gudashada waajibkooda, ayna kaalin mug leh ka qaataan sidii loo gaari-lahaa xal siyaasadeed oo looga badbaado dib u laabasho siyaasadeed iyo dagaallo sokeeye”. Maxamed Farmaajo ayaa sidoo kale ka dalbaday maxdaxa mucaaradka iyo hoggaanka sare ee Villa Somalia inay si dhab ah ula shaqeeyaan odayaasha dhaqanka, si looga wada shaqeeyo sii socodka geediga dowlad dhiska Soomaaliya. “Waxaan markale madaxda siyaasadda dalka muxaafid iyo mucaarad ugu baaqayaa inaan odayaasha dhaqanka Soomaaliyeed siinno kaalin dhab ah oo ay ka qaadan karaan geeddi socodka dowlad dhiska Soomaaliya, bacdamaa ayagu ahaayeen kuwii dhisay hannaankii lagu unkay jamhuuriyadda saddexaad ee Soomaaliya”. ayuu mar kale yiri Madaxweynihii hore ee dalka. Madaxweynaha Soomaaliya ayaa shalay caddeeyay in aysan jirin xaalad sababi karta in dalka uu burburo, balse siyaasaddu leedahay is-rii xriix, ayna iska dhamaan doonto, isaga oo soo dhaweeyay in dhaqanku qaato doorkiisa. “Dhaqanka Soomaaliyeedow waa joogtaan maanta waana fursad ee qofkii khaldan gacanta qabta, kan saxanna garab istaaga. Dab kama kace looma baahno dowladnimadeena waa kortay siyaasaddu is jiid jiid iyo is riix riix waa leedahay annaga kan naga dhex jiro ma ah mid burburin, dumin ama balaayo dhaceyso waana dabeecad ay siyaasadda wadato wayna hagaageysaa” ayuu yiri Madaxweyne Xasan Sheekh Maxamuud. The post Farmaajo oo taageeray baaqii Shariif ee uu aqbalay Xasab appeared first on Caasimada Online .

Madaxweynaha Soomaaliya ayaa shalay caddeeyay in aysan jirin xaalad sababi karta in dalka uu burburo, balse siyaasaddu leedahay is-rii xriix, ayna iska dhamaan doonto, isaga oo soo dhaweeyay in dhaqanku qaato doorkiisa. “Dhaqanka Soomaaliyeedow waa joogtaan maanta waana fursad ee qofkii khaldan gacanta qabta, kan saxanna garab istaaga. Dab kama kace looma baahno dowladnimadeena waa kortay siyaasaddu is jiid jiid iyo is riix riix waa leedahay annaga kan naga dhex jiro ma ah mid burburin, dumin ama balaayo dhaceyso waana dabeecad ay siyaasadda wadato wayna hagaageysaa” ayuu yiri Madaxweyne Xasan Sheekh Maxamuud. The post Farmaajo oo taageeray baaqii Shariif ee uu aqbalay Xasab appeared first on Caasimada Online .

items.title: Weerar cusub oo ISIS ku qaaday macdan dahab ah oo ku taalla Congo
items.description: Weerar cusub oo ISIS ku qaaday macdan dahab ah oo ku taalla Congo Kooxda Islamic State Central Africa Province ayaa weerar ku qaaday macdan dahab ah oo ku taalla gobolka Ituri ee bariga dalka Democratic Republic of the Congo , taas oo lagu tilmaamay mid muujinaysa isbeddel ku yimid habka iyo xeeladaha ay adeegsadaan. Macdanta Muchacha, oo ay maamusho shirkad Shiine ah, ayaa ah goob weyn oo ay ka shaqeeyaan kumannaan qof, isla markaana ay ilaalinayeen ciidamo ka tirsan FARDC . Wararka la helayo ayaa sheegaya in dagaalyahanno ka tirsan kooxda ay weerarka ku dileen ugu yaraan 7 askari, kadibna ay gubeen dhismayaal iyo qalab yaallay goobta, sidoo kalena ay qaateen hubkii halkaas yaallay. Intaas kadib, weerar kale oo ay ku qaadeen tuulo u dhow ayaa lagu dilay 17 qof oo rayid ah, guryo badanna waa la gubay. Dad badan oo deegaanka ah, oo ay ku jiraan shaqaale iyo ajaanib, ayaa ka cararay goobta iyagoo adeegsanaya doonyo maraya webiga Ituri. Weerarkan ayaa ahaa kii ugu horreeyay ee kooxda ku qaaddo macdan weyn oo si adag loo ilaaliyo. Horey waxay diiradda u saari jireen macdanno yar-yar oo dad gaar loo leeyahay ay ka shaqeeyaan. Falanqeeyayaal ayaa sheegay in tani ay muujinayso in kooxda ay wali awood u leedahay inay qorsheyso weerarro waaweyn, inkastoo ay socdeen howlgallo militari oo muddo dheer lagu wiiqayay. Warbixinnada ayaa tilmaamaya in kooxda ay isticmaasho qalab casri ah sida GPS iyo diyaarado yaryar (drones) si ay u sahamiyaan goobaha ay beegsanayaan. Sidoo kale, kaymaha cufan ee gobolka ayaa u sahla inay si fudud ugu dhuuntaan, taas oo ka dhigaysa in si adag loo ogaado dhaq-dhaqaaqooda.

items.title: XARIGGA CIKRAMA IYO CAKIRNAANTA KA JIRTA GUDAHA KOOXDA AS
items.description: Hordhac Kooban Markii ay ciidanka gaarka ah ee Maraykanka, SEAL Team Six , ay ka soo degeen xeebta Barawe iyaga oo wata doomo dheereeya sannadkii 2013, bartilmaameedkoodu ma ahayn oo kaliya argaggixiye ka tirsan kooxda al-Shabaab (AS), balse wuxu ahaa nin dhalinyaro ah oo isu maray Mambasa, Norway, London, Suudaan, Koonfur Afrika iyo Eritrea, oo lix luuqadood ku hadla, kaasoo hore uga badbaaday labo hawlgal oo lagu qaarajin rabay. Maanta, saddex iyo toban sano ka dib weerarkaas, wuxuu ku xiran yahay xabsi ay gacanta ku hayaan isla kooxdii uu muddada dheer ee 18ka sano ah ka tirsanaa. Xariggiisu ma ahan kaliya dhacdo muujinaysa culays amni, waase arrin laga dhex arki karo kalashakiga baahsan ee ka dhex aloolsan hoggaanka sare ee kooxda AS. Cikrama oo ah magaca uu ku hawlgalo ayaa muddo dheer ahaa “buundada” isku xirta maleeshiyaadka deegaanka iyo unugyada caalamiga ah ee al-Qaacidda, qabashadiisuna waxay calaamad u tahay bilowga olole sifayn ah oo gudaha ah, kaas oo ka dhashay farriintii dhowaan ka soo baxday Mahad Karataay ee ku saabsanayd dhexgalka sirdoonka shisheeye. Warbixintan waxay si qotadheer u faallaynaysaa raadkii Cikrama; laga soo bilaabo noloshiisii magangalyadoonka ee dalka Norway iyo doorkii uu ku lahaa weerarradii dhiigga badnaa ee Westgate iyo Gaarisa, ilaa ay maanta su’aali ka taagan tahay in badbaadadiisii mucjisada ahayd ay ku soo dhammaan karto ku-bixidda gacanta saaxiibbadiisii uu muddada dheer u soo adeegayay. Xarigga Cikrama Cabdiraxmaan Azhari, Agaasimaha Wargelin Analytica ahna sarkaal hore oo ka tirsanaa Amniga Qaranka ee Soomaaliya, ayaa bartiisa X ku shaaciyay in kooxda al-Shabaab ay xabsiga dhigtay Cabdiqaadir Maxamed Cabdiqaadir (Cikrama) dhammaadka bishii Maarso 2026kii. Xogtan ayaa tilmaamaysa in sirdoonka gudaha ee amniyaadka ay qabteen sarkaalkan ka dib markii la la’aa dhawr bilood, iyadoo markii danbe laga helay aag ka baxsan fariisimihiisii lagu ogaa. Sida uu Azhari xusay, xariggan ayaa yimid ka dib markii uu dhashay tuhun ah in Cikrama uu sameeyay safar ka baxsan dhulka ay maamuusho kooxda, taas oo keentay in hoggaanka kooxdu ay tuhmeen inuu “tanaasul” sameeyay ama uu xiriir la yeeshay sirdoonno shisheeye. Xiritaanka sarkaalkan ayaa sidoo kale ku soo beegmaya xilli xasaasi ah, maadaama horraantii bishii March 2026 uu farriin maqal ah soo saaray Mahad Karataay , oo ah ku-xigeenka hoggaamiyaha guud ee kooxda AS. Karataay ayaa farriintiisa ku nuuxnuuxsaday in sirdoonka dawladda iyo kuwa caalamiga ah ay si weyn u dhex galeen kooxda, isagoo shaaciyay cafis shuruudaysan oo loogu talagalay xubnaha sirdoonka u shaqeeya ee toobad keena, halka uu ugu hanjabay dil toogasho ah cid kasta oo lagu helo basaasnimo. Arrintan ayaa muujinaysa in xarigga Cikrama uu qeyb ka yahay olole ballaaran oo “sifayn” ah oo ay kooxdu ku ugaarsanayso xubnaheeda ugu sarreeya ee laga shakisan yahay. Maxaa laga Yaqaanaa Cikrama? Cabdiqaadir Cikrama waa mid ka mid ah saraakiisha ugu saamaynta badan uguna qarsoodiga badan kooxda AS. Sida ay xuseen ilawareedyo dhanka sirdoonka ah iyo qoraallada falanqaynta amniga, Cikrama waxa uu dhashay sanadkii 1979 , isagoo ku dhashay magaalada Mombasa ee dalka Kenya, qabiil ahaanna waxa uu ka soo jeedaa beesha Degoodi. Sida ay baahisay warbaahinta caalamiga ah ee kala ah Reuters, NYT, NRK, START, TV2, Cikrama waa nin si buuxda ugu hadla lix luuqadood oo kala ah Soomaali, Ingiriis, Sawaaxili, Carabi, Faransiis, iyo Noorwiijiyaan; awooddan ayaa la sheegay inay u saamaxday inuu noqdo isku-xiraha muhaajiriinta iyo hawlgallada dibadda ee kooxda. Marka la eego safarradiisii qurbaha, warbaahinta Norway ee TV2 iyo NRK ayaa wariyeen in Cikrama uu dalkaas galay sannadkii 2004 , isagoo magangalyo weydiistay. Hay’adda sirdoonka Norway ee Politiets sikkerhetstjeneste (PST) ayaa xaqiijisay inuu dalkaas degganaa afar sano, isagoo ku noolaa xarun lagu qaabilo qaxootiga oo ku taallo Moelv, balse codsigiisii magangalyada waa la diiday, wuxuuna dalkaas ka baxay sannadkii 2008 . Sida lagu xusay qoraallada taariikh-nololeedkiisa, kadib markii uu ka tagay Norway, waxa uu muddo hal sano ah ku noolaa magaalada London, sirdoonka Kenya ayaana sheegay inuu sido kale u safray dalal ay ka mid yihiin Suudaan, Koonfur Afrika, iyo Eritrea kahor intaanu si rasmi ah ugu wareegin Soomaaliya. Sida ay sheegtay Pentagon-ka iyo ila-wareedyo hore oo ka tirsanaa Maxkamadaha Islaamiga ah, Cikrama waxa uu Soomaaliya dib ugu soo laabtay sannadkii 2008, isagoo qayb ka ahaa dhalinyaradii qurbaha ka yimid ee ku biiray kooxda AS. Sida ay baahisay wasaaradda gaashaandhigga Mareykanka, Cikrama waxa ay aad isugu dhowaayeen ergayaashii hore ee al-Qaacidda ee Bariga Afrika, sida Fasuul Cabdalla Maxamed iyo Saalax Nabhaan, halkaas oo uu ka soo bartay khibradda sirdoonka iyo qorshaynta weerarrada. Sida ay sheegeen khubarada amniga gobolka, Cikrama waxa uu caan ku yahay inuu yahay maskax qorsheeye, isagoo ahaa ninkii ka danbeeyay aasaaska saddexda jabhadood ee kooxdu ay ku dhex abuurtay gudaha dalka Kenya. Weerarradii uu maleegay iyo kuwii uu ka badbaaday Cikrama waxaa loo aqoonsan yahay mid ka mid ah maskaxda ugu sarraysa ee kooxda AS u qaabilsan qorshaynta weerarrada ka dhaca dibadda. Sida ay werisay wakaaladda wararka ee Reuters, Cikrama waxa uu door muhiim ah ka qaatay qorshaynta iyo isku-xirka weerarkii dhiigga badan ku daatay ee xarunta ganacsiga Westgate Mall ee magaalada Nairobi ka dhacay bishii September 2013 , halkaas oo lagu dilay 67 qof. Sidoo kale, sirdoonka Kenya iyo xarunta cilmi-baarista ee START (National Consortium for the Study of Terrorism and Responses to Terrorism) ayaa aaminsan inuu ka danbeeyay weerarkii Jaamacadda Gaarisa ee sanadkii 2015, kaas oo lagu laayay ku dhowaad 148 arday. Cikrama waxa uu ahaa ninkii maskaxda u ahaa aasaaska saddex jabhadood oo ka hawlgala gudaha dalka Kenya, kuwaas oo gaystay in ka badan 20 weerar oo isugu jira qaraxyo, afduubyo, iyo dilal qorshaysan intii u dhaxeysay 2011 ilaa 2015.  Dhanka kale, Cikrama waxa uu leeyahay taariikh yaab leh oo uu kaga badbaaday isku-dayo dil iyo qabasho oo lala beegsaday. Midka ugu caansan waa weerarkii Baraawe ee dhacay  October 2013 , laba toddobaad uun ka dib weerarkii Westgate. Afhayeenka Pentagon-ka, George Little, ayaa xaqiijiyay in ciidamada badda ee Mareykanka ee loo yaqaanno SEAL Team Six (DEVGRU) ay weerar dhanka badda ah ku qaadeen guri ku yaalla xeebta Baraawe si ay nolosha ugu soo qabtaan Cikrama, balse waa uu ka badbaaday ka dib markii dagaal culus uu dhex maray ciidanka iyo ilaaladiisii.  Sidoo kale, sanadkii 2014 , ciidanka ammaanka Kenya ayaa weerar ku qaaday guri ku yaalla Mombasa ka dib markii ay heleen xog sheegaysa inuu halkaas joogo, balse wuu ka baxsaday goobta kahor intaanay ciidanku soo gaarin, waxaana halkaas lagu dilay nin kale oo isaga lagu khalday. Ugu danbayntii, Cikrama ma uusan ka badbaadin oo kaliya weerarrada shisheeyaha, balse wuxuu, sidoo kale, ka badbaaday khilaafaadka dhiigga ku daatay ee gudaha kooxda AS. Sida ay sheegeen ilo wareedyo xog-ogaal ah, bishii Abriil 2014 , isaga oo maraya degaanka Haawaay ee Gobolka Shabeellaha Hoose, waxaa lala beegsaday qarax miino oo ay soo abaabuleen ciidanka Amniyaadka ee hoostaga amiirkii hore ee Kooxda AS, Axmed-Godane, ka dib markii uu soo kala dhex galay khilaaf dhanka istiraatiijiyadda ah, balse qaraxaasna waa uu ka badbaaday. Badbaadadiisa joogtada ah iyo awooddiisa dhuumashada ayaa ka dhigtay mid kamid ah dadka ugu muhiimsan ee ay sirdoonka caalamku doondoonayaan, isagoo madaxiisa la saaray 2014 lacag dhan $3 milyan ilaa $5 milyan oo doollar. Falanqayn: Maxay ka Dhigan Tahay Xarigga Cikrama? Xarigga Cabduqaadir Cikrama, wuxuu calaamad u yahay mid ka mid ah isbeddellada ugu waaweyn ee ka dhex dhacay hoggaanka sare ee kooxda al-Shabaab, tobankii sano ee u danbaysay. Maadaama uu Cikrama ahaa sarkaalka ugu muhiimsan ee iskuxira kooxda al-Shabaab iyo garabyada caalamiga ah, xariggiisu ma ahan oo kaliya khasaare dhanka hoggaanka ah, waase dhabarjab weyn oo ku yimid kalsoonidii iyo nidaamkii sirdoonka ee argaggaxisada al-Shabaab. Xaqiiqda ah in “Amniyaadka” ay qabteen sarkaal miisaankaas leh, isagoo ku sugan meel ka baxsan fariisimihiisii rasmiga ahaa, waxay xaqiijinaysaa in kooxda argaggaxisada ah ee al-Shabaab ay hadda gashay marxalad kalashaki gudaha ah oo aad u sarraysa. Farriintii Mahad Karataay ee billowgii Maarso 2026, ee ku saabsanayd dhex-galka sirdoonka, waxay ahayd hordhaca rasmiga ah ee ololahan sifaynta ah. Karataay waxa uu si cad u qirtay in sirdoonka dawladda iyo kuwa caalamiga ah ay si weyn u dhex-galeen unugyada kooxda, taas oo la micno ah in al-Shabaab ay hadda u arkaan xubnahooda ugu aqoonta badan—gaar ahaan kuwa qurbaha ka yimid sida Cikrama—inay yihiin dad u nugul inay la shaqeeyaan sirdoonnada shisheeye. Cikrama, oo ku hadla lix luuqadood isla markaasna yaqaan habfikirka reer Galbeedka, waxa uu hadda dhibbane u noqday isla aqoontii markii hore kooxda loogu soo dhoweeyay. Marka la eego dhanka hawlgallada, xarigga Cikrama waxa uu curyaaminayaa awoodda al-Shabaab ee qorsheynta weerarrada ka dhaca dibadda. Cikrama waxa uu ahaa “maskaxda” ka danbaysay jabhadaha Kenya ka hawlgala iyo weerarradii Westgate iyo Gaarisa; haddaba, maqnaanshihiisu waxay wiiqi doontaa xiriirka kooxdu la leedahay unugyada muhaajiriinta iyo qorsheynta weerarrada casriga ah. Tani waxay dhalin kartaa in kooxdu ay dib ugu laabato weerarrada fudfudud ee gudaha, iyadoo luminaysa saamayntii ay ku lahayd gobolka iyo caalamka. Ugu danbayntii, haddii Cikrama loo dilo eedeymo la xiriira tanaasul ama sirdoon, waxay fariin cabsi leh u diraysaa dhalinyarada kale ee qurbaha ka yimid ee kooxda ka tirsan. Tani waxay horseedi kartaa in kooxdu u kala qaybsanto garabyo iska shaki qaba, taas oo fududayn karta inay sii dumaan unugyada sirdoonka iyo kuwa hawlgallada ee kooxda. Badbaadadii yaabka lahayd ee Cikrama uu kaga soo dhex baxay weerarradii SEAL Team Six iyo miinooyinkii Axmed-Godane, waxay u muuqataa inay hadda ku dhammaan rabto gacanta saaxiibbadiisii uu muddada dheer u soo shaqaynayay, taas oo muujinaysa in khatarta ugu weyn ee hoggaanka al-Shabaab ay hadda ka dhex jirto gudahooda.

Sida lagu xusay qoraallada taariikh-nololeedkiisa, kadib markii uu ka tagay Norway, waxa uu muddo hal sano ah ku noolaa magaalada London, sirdoonka Kenya ayaana sheegay inuu sido kale u safray dalal ay ka mid yihiin Suudaan, Koonfur Afrika, iyo Eritrea kahor intaanu si rasmi ah ugu wareegin Soomaaliya. Sida ay sheegtay Pentagon-ka iyo ila-wareedyo hore oo ka tirsanaa Maxkamadaha Islaamiga ah, Cikrama waxa uu Soomaaliya dib ugu soo laabtay sannadkii 2008, isagoo qayb ka ahaa dhalinyaradii qurbaha ka yimid ee ku biiray kooxda AS. Sida ay baahisay wasaaradda gaashaandhigga Mareykanka, Cikrama waxa ay aad isugu dhowaayeen ergayaashii hore ee al-Qaacidda ee Bariga Afrika, sida Fasuul Cabdalla Maxamed iyo Saalax Nabhaan, halkaas oo uu ka soo bartay khibradda sirdoonka iyo qorshaynta weerarrada. Sida ay sheegeen khubarada amniga gobolka, Cikrama waxa uu caan ku yahay inuu yahay maskax qorsheeye, isagoo ahaa ninkii ka danbeeyay aasaaska saddexda jabhadood ee kooxdu ay ku dhex abuurtay gudaha dalka Kenya. Weerarradii uu maleegay iyo kuwii uu ka badbaaday Cikrama waxaa loo aqoonsan yahay mid ka mid ah maskaxda ugu sarraysa ee kooxda AS u qaabilsan qorshaynta weerarrada ka dhaca dibadda. Sida ay werisay wakaaladda wararka ee Reuters, Cikrama waxa uu door muhiim ah ka qaatay qorshaynta iyo isku-xirka weerarkii dhiigga badan ku daatay ee xarunta ganacsiga Westgate Mall ee magaalada Nairobi ka dhacay bishii September 2013 , halkaas oo lagu dilay 67 qof. Sidoo kale, sirdoonka Kenya iyo xarunta cilmi-baarista ee START (National Consortium for the Study of Terrorism and Responses to Terrorism) ayaa aaminsan inuu ka danbeeyay weerarkii Jaamacadda Gaarisa ee sanadkii 2015, kaas oo lagu laayay ku dhowaad 148 arday. Cikrama waxa uu ahaa ninkii maskaxda u ahaa aasaaska saddex jabhadood oo ka hawlgala gudaha dalka Kenya, kuwaas oo gaystay in ka badan 20 weerar oo isugu jira qaraxyo, afduubyo, iyo dilal qorshaysan intii u dhaxeysay 2011 ilaa 2015.  Dhanka kale, Cikrama waxa uu leeyahay taariikh yaab leh oo uu kaga badbaaday isku-dayo dil iyo qabasho oo lala beegsaday. Midka ugu caansan waa weerarkii Baraawe ee dhacay  October 2013 , laba toddobaad uun ka dib weerarkii Westgate. Afhayeenka Pentagon-ka, George Little, ayaa xaqiijiyay in ciidamada badda ee Mareykanka ee loo yaqaanno SEAL Team Six (DEVGRU) ay weerar dhanka badda ah ku qaadeen guri ku yaalla xeebta Baraawe si ay nolosha ugu soo qabtaan Cikrama, balse waa uu ka badbaaday ka dib markii dagaal culus uu dhex maray ciidanka iyo ilaaladiisii.  Sidoo kale, sanadkii 2014 , ciidanka ammaanka Kenya ayaa weerar ku qaaday guri ku yaalla Mombasa ka dib markii ay heleen xog sheegaysa inuu halkaas joogo, balse wuu ka baxsaday goobta kahor intaanay ciidanku soo gaarin, waxaana halkaas lagu dilay nin kale oo isaga lagu khalday. Ugu danbayntii, Cikrama ma uusan ka badbaadin oo kaliya weerarrada shisheeyaha, balse wuxuu, sidoo kale, ka badbaaday khilaafaadka dhiigga ku daatay ee gudaha kooxda AS. Sida ay sheegeen ilo wareedyo xog-ogaal ah, bishii Abriil 2014 , isaga oo maraya degaanka Haawaay ee Gobolka Shabeellaha Hoose, waxaa lala beegsaday qarax miino oo ay soo abaabuleen ciidanka Amniyaadka ee hoostaga amiirkii hore ee Kooxda AS, Axmed-Godane, ka dib markii uu soo kala dhex galay khilaaf dhanka istiraatiijiyadda ah, balse qaraxaasna waa uu ka badbaaday. Badbaadadiisa joogtada ah iyo awooddiisa dhuumashada ayaa ka dhigtay mid kamid ah dadka ugu muhiimsan ee ay sirdoonka caalamku doondoonayaan, isagoo madaxiisa la saaray 2014 lacag dhan $3 milyan ilaa $5 milyan oo doollar. Falanqayn: Maxay ka Dhigan Tahay Xarigga Cikrama? Xarigga Cabduqaadir Cikrama, wuxuu calaamad u yahay mid ka mid ah isbeddellada ugu waaweyn ee ka dhex dhacay hoggaanka sare ee kooxda al-Shabaab, tobankii sano ee u danbaysay. Maadaama uu Cikrama ahaa sarkaalka ugu muhiimsan ee iskuxira kooxda al-Shabaab iyo garabyada caalamiga ah, xariggiisu ma ahan oo kaliya khasaare dhanka hoggaanka ah, waase dhabarjab weyn oo ku yimid kalsoonidii iyo nidaamkii sirdoonka ee argaggaxisada al-Shabaab. Xaqiiqda ah in “Amniyaadka” ay qabteen sarkaal miisaankaas leh, isagoo ku sugan meel ka baxsan fariisimihiisii rasmiga ahaa, waxay xaqiijinaysaa in kooxda argaggaxisada ah ee al-Shabaab ay hadda gashay marxalad kalashaki gudaha ah oo aad u sarraysa. Farriintii Mahad Karataay ee billowgii Maarso 2026, ee ku saabsanayd dhex-galka sirdoonka, waxay ahayd hordhaca rasmiga ah ee ololahan sifaynta ah. Karataay waxa uu si cad u qirtay in sirdoonka dawladda iyo kuwa caalamiga ah ay si weyn u dhex-galeen unugyada kooxda, taas oo la micno ah in al-Shabaab ay hadda u arkaan xubnahooda ugu aqoonta badan—gaar ahaan kuwa qurbaha ka yimid sida Cikrama—inay yihiin dad u nugul inay la shaqeeyaan sirdoonnada shisheeye. Cikrama, oo ku hadla lix luuqadood isla markaasna yaqaan habfikirka reer Galbeedka, waxa uu hadda dhibbane u noqday isla aqoontii markii hore kooxda loogu soo dhoweeyay. Marka la eego dhanka hawlgallada, xarigga Cikrama waxa uu curyaaminayaa awoodda al-Shabaab ee qorsheynta weerarrada ka dhaca dibadda. Cikrama waxa uu ahaa “maskaxda” ka danbaysay jabhadaha Kenya ka hawlgala iyo weerarradii Westgate iyo Gaarisa; haddaba, maqnaanshihiisu waxay wiiqi doontaa xiriirka kooxdu la leedahay unugyada muhaajiriinta iyo qorsheynta weerarrada casriga ah. Tani waxay dhalin kartaa in kooxdu ay dib ugu laabato weerarrada fudfudud ee gudaha, iyadoo luminaysa saamayntii ay ku lahayd gobolka iyo caalamka. Ugu danbayntii, haddii Cikrama loo dilo eedeymo la xiriira tanaasul ama sirdoon, waxay fariin cabsi leh u diraysaa dhalinyarada kale ee qurbaha ka yimid ee kooxda ka tirsan. Tani waxay horseedi kartaa in kooxdu u kala qaybsanto garabyo iska shaki qaba, taas oo fududayn karta inay sii dumaan unugyada sirdoonka iyo kuwa hawlgallada ee kooxda. Badbaadadii yaabka lahayd ee Cikrama uu kaga soo dhex baxay weerarradii SEAL Team Six iyo miinooyinkii Axmed-Godane, waxay u muuqataa inay hadda ku dhammaan rabto gacanta saaxiibbadiisii uu muddada dheer u soo shaqaynayay, taas oo muujinaysa in khatarta ugu weyn ee hoggaanka al-Shabaab ay hadda ka dhex jirto gudahooda.

items.title: Wasiirka Arrimaha Dibedda Somaliland oo la kulmay orodyahan Maxamed Ordaaye
items.description: Wasiirka Arrimaha Dibedda Somaliland oo qaabilay Maxamed Ordaaye Wasiirka Wasaaradda Arrimaha Dibedda Somaliland, Cabdiraxmaan Daahir Aaden , oo uu la socday Agaasimaha Guud Mohamed Abdirahman Hassan , ayaa maanta xarunta wasaaradda ku qaabilay Maxamed Axmed Aw Cali, oo loo yaqaan Ordaaye. Maxamed ayaa caan ku noqday muuqaallo orod ah oo uu ku baahiyo baraha bulshada, kuwaas oo si degdeg ah u faafay, isla markaana soo jiitay indhaha warbaahinta caalamka. Waxaa xitaa la sheegay in ay la soo xiriireen shirkado iyo kooxo ciyaareed oo magac leh. Wasiirka ayaa ku ammaanay dadaalka iyo adkeysiga uu muujiyay, isagoo xusay in Ordaaye uu tusaale u yahay dhalinyarada, gaar ahaan dadka qaba baahiyaha gaarka ah. Wuxuu sidoo kale u sheegay in dowladda iyo wasaaraddu ay garab taagan yihiin. Dhankiisa, Ordaaye ayaa muujiyay farxad uu ku tilmaamay mid weyn, isagoo sheegay inuu si sharaf leh u matali doono dalkiisa meel kasta oo uu tago, islamarkaana uu rajeynayo in la sii xoojiyo taageerada dhalinyarada leh hibada.

items.title: Madaxweyne Hore Maxamed Cabdullaahi Farmaajo oo Baaq Midnimo Qaran iyo Xoojinta Doorka Odayaasha Dhaqanka Jeediyey
items.description: WAR SAXAAFADEED Abriil 26, 2026 Waxaan codkayga ku biirinayaa baaqii shalay uu soo jeediyey Madaxweynihii hore Shariif Sheekh Axmed uuna taageeray Madaxweyne Xasan Sheekh Maxamuud mar ay ka hadlayeen madashii caleema-saarka Ugaas Cabdirisaaq Ugaas Cabdullaahi Ugaas Xaashi oo ahayd madal muujisay baahida ay Soomaalidu u qabto midnimo iyo wadahadal. Sidoo kale, waxaa xusid mudan kaalintii iyo dadaalladii uu hore u muujiyey Madaxweynihii hore Maxamed Cabdullaahi Farmaajo ee la xiriiray adkeynta midnimada iyo wadajirka ummadda Soomaaliyeed. Baaqa Madaxweynayaasha waxaa uu salka ku hayey kaalinta ay duubabka dhaqanka Soomaaliyeed ee ku kulmay caasimadda dalka ay ka qaadan karaan xal u helidda ismari-waaga siyaasadeed ee dalka ka jira. Haddaba waxaan sidoo kale halkan baaq uga gudbinayaa duubabka Soomaaliyeed inay u istaagaan gudashada waajibkooda, ayna kaalin mug leh ka qaataan sidii loo gaari-lahaa xal siyaasadeed oo looga badbaado dib u laabasho siyaasadeed iyo dagaallo sokeeye. Ugu dambeyn, waxaan markale madaxda siyaasadda dalka muxaafid iyo mucaarad ugu baaqayaa inaan odayaasha dhaqanka Soomaaliyeed siinno kaalin dhab ah oo ay ka qaadan karaan geeddi socodka dowlad dhiska Soomaaliya, bacdamaa ayagu ahaayeen kuwii dhisay hannaankii lagu unkay jamhuuriyadda saddexaad ee Soomaaliya.

items.title: Dowladda Soomaaliya oo Xabsiga Dhigtay Maamulkii Shirkadda Favori iyo Xoghayntiisa
items.description: Dowladda Soomaaliya oo xabsiga dhigtay Maamulihii Shirkadda Favori iyo xoghayntiisa Muqdisho – Ilo ku dhow hay’adaha amniga ayaa xaqiijiyay in dowladda Federaalka Soomaaliya ay xabsiga dhigtay Maamulihii shirkadda Favori LLC iyo xoghayntiisa, kadib markii lagu eedeeyay hab-dhaqan shaqo oo ay si weyn uga cabanayeen qaar ka mid ah shaqaalaha iyo dadka adeegsada adeegyada garoonka. Xariggan ayaa ka dhacay magaalada Muqdisho, iyadoo la sheegay in baaritaanno hordhac ah lagu hayo eedeymo la xiriira maamulka iyo qaabka ay ula dhaqmi jireen shaqaalaha ka howlgala garoonka diyaaradaha Aden Adde International Airport . Cabashooyin hore oo la xiriira shaqaalaha Wararka la helayo ayaa tilmaamaya in muddooyinkii u dambeeyay ay jireen cabashooyin isdaba joog ah oo ka imaanayay shaqaalaha, kuwaas oo ku saabsan cadaadis shaqo iyo hab maamul oo aan raalli laga ahayn. Ilo xog-ogaal ah ayaa sheegaya in tallaabadan ay timid kadib kormeer iyo baaritaan ay wadeen hay’adaha dowladda, inkastoo aan weli si rasmi ah loo shaacin natiijada kama dambaysta ah. Kiiskan ayaa la sheegay inuu saameyn ku yeelan karo qaar ka mid ah adeegyada garoonka caalamiga ah ee Muqdisho, maadaama shirkaddu ay ka mid ahayd kuwa maamula adeegyo muhiim ah. Si kastaba, saraakiisha dowladda ayaa la filayaa inay soo saaraan warbixin faahfaahsan maalmaha soo socda, si loo caddeeyo xaaladda rasmiga ah.

items.title: Guddoomiyaha Golaha Shacabka BJFS iyo Wafdi uu Hoggaaminayo oo Si Diirran loogu Soo Dhoweeyey Baydhabo
items.description: GUDDOOMIYAHA GOLAHA SHACABKA EE BJFS OO SI DIIRRAN LOOGU SOO DHOWEEYEY MAGAALADA BAYDHABO Baydhabo, Soomaaliya – 26 Abriil 2026 — Guddoomiyaha Golaha Shacabka ee Baarlamaanka Jamhuuriyadda Federaalka Soomaaliya, Mudane Sheekh Aadan Maxamed Nuur (Madoobe), iyo wafdi ka kooban wasiirro iyo xildhibaanno ayaa gaaray Baydhabo. Wafdiga ayaa waxaa garoonka diyaaradaha ee Shaati Guduud kusoo dhoweeyey hoggaamiyaha ku-meel-gaarka ah ee Dowlad Goboleedka Koonfur Galbeed, wasiirro, xildhibaanno ka tirsan maamulka, odayaasha dhaqanka, iyo qeybaha kala duwan ee bulshada magaalada Baydhabo. Guddoomiyaha ayaa hadal uu ka jeediyay garoonka diyaaradaha uga mahadceliyey masuuliyiinta iyo bulshada sida diirran ee ay u soo dhoweeyeen, isagoo xusay in muddada uu ku sugan yahay Baydhabo uu kulamo kala duwan la qaadan doono maamulka iyo qeybaha kala duwan ee bulshada Koonfur Galbeed. Ugu dambeyn, Guddoomiyaha Golaha Shacabka ayaa tilmaamay in dhawaan deegaanada Dowlad Goboleedka Koonfur Galbeed ay ka dhici doonto doorasho ay ku qanacsan yihiin shacabka reer Koonfur Galbeed, taas oo ka shaqeyn doonta horumarinta adeegyada dowladnimo ee ay xaqa u leeyihiin.

items.title: DF oo saraakiil u dirtay Luuq iyo xaaladda oo kacsan
items.description: Luuq (Caasimada Online) – Saraakiil ka tirsan Ciidanka Xoogga Dalka Soomaaliyeed oo ay maanta dowladda ka dirtay magaalada Muqdisho ayaa gaaray degmada Luuq ee gobolka Gedo, halkaas oo ay horay uga jireen dhaq-dhaqaaqyo ciidan oo iska soo horjeedo. Saraakiisha maanta tegay Luuq ayaa waxaa hoggaaminaya Abaanduulaha Guutada 43-aad Kornayl Cismaan Xaaji Axmed, waxaana halkaas kusoo dhaweeyay ciidamada dowladda ee horay u joogay halkaasi. Ujeedka wafdigan ayaa ah fulinta qorshaha dowladda, iyaga oo durbo bilaabay kulamo ay la qaadanayaan ciidamada iyo qaybaha kala duwan ee bulshada. Gedo qaybo kamid ah waxaa horay ugu sugnaa ciidamo ka tirsan daraawiishta Jubaland oo diidan dhaq-dhaqaaqa dowladda ee gobolkaasi, sidoo kale waxaa maalmo kahor gobolka tegay ciidamadii taabacsanaa Lafta-gareen ee isaga baxay agagaarka magaalada Baydhabo. Arrintan ayaa keentay in xiisad cusub la dareemo, iyada oo laga cabsi qabo in ciidamadan kala duwan ay horseedaan dagaal ka qarxa halkaas. Loolanka u dhexeeya Dowladda Federaalka iyo Maamulka Jubbaland ayaa sii xoogeysanaya, iyaga oo mar kale u muuqda kuwa fooda is dari doono, marka la eego sida ay wax u socdaan, gaar ahaan dhaq-dhaqaaqyada labada dhinac. Dowladda dhexe ayaa qorsheyneysa in doorashooyin qof iyo cod ah ay ka qabato degmooyin ka tirsan Gedo, halka ay diidan tahay Jubbaland. Muqdisho iyo Kismaayo ayaa muddo dheer waxaa ka dhexeeya khilaaf isku beddelay gacan ka hadal, sidoo kalena sababay inuu go’o xiriirkii labada dhinac. The post DF oo saraakiil u dirtay Luuq iyo xaaladda oo kacsan appeared first on Caasimada Online .

Arrintan ayaa keentay in xiisad cusub la dareemo, iyada oo laga cabsi qabo in ciidamadan kala duwan ay horseedaan dagaal ka qarxa halkaas. Loolanka u dhexeeya Dowladda Federaalka iyo Maamulka Jubbaland ayaa sii xoogeysanaya, iyaga oo mar kale u muuqda kuwa fooda is dari doono, marka la eego sida ay wax u socdaan, gaar ahaan dhaq-dhaqaaqyada labada dhinac. Dowladda dhexe ayaa qorsheyneysa in doorashooyin qof iyo cod ah ay ka qabato degmooyin ka tirsan Gedo, halka ay diidan tahay Jubbaland. Muqdisho iyo Kismaayo ayaa muddo dheer waxaa ka dhexeeya khilaaf isku beddelay gacan ka hadal, sidoo kalena sababay inuu go’o xiriirkii labada dhinac. items.title: Villa Somalia Backs Aden Madoobe for South West State Presidency
items.description: A high-level meeting held overnight at the Villa Somalia has resulted in key political decisions supporting Aden Mohamed Nur, widely known as Aden Madoobe, to contest for the presidency of South West State. According to sources familiar with the discussions, the meeting also approved the promotion of Hussein Sheikh Mahmoud to the position of Secretary-General of the Justice and Solidarity Party (JSP), a move seen as reflecting his growing influence in domestic politics, particularly in relation to the forthcoming elections in South West State. These developments come amid intensifying political competition and preparations for regional elections, which have significantly heightened political activity within South West State and the ruling party aligned with the federal leadership. Aden Madoobe is expected to travel to Baidoa, the administrative capital of the Bay region, where political mobilization linked to the electoral process is already underway. Reports indicate that the federal leadership aims to reward his role in advancing recent constitutional amendments, which is viewed as part of a broader strategy to bolster his candidacy. However, the plan is likely to face resistance, as several political actors have expressed dissatisfaction with the current trajectory of the electoral process. Observers note that the situation remains fluid, with further reactions and political shifts expected in the coming days that could influence the direction of the South West State elections. The post Villa Somalia Backs Aden Madoobe for South West State Presidency appeared first on Raxanreeb Online .

items.title: Taliyaha ciidanka xoogga oo tagay furimaha dagaalka ee gobolka Bakool
items.description: Bakool ( Raxanreeb Online) Taliyaha Ciidanka Xoogga Dalka Soomaaliyeed, sarreeye Guuto Ibraahim Maxamed Maxamuud, ayaa booqday fariisimaha Ciidanka Xoogga Dalka ay ku leeyihiin magaalada Waajid ee gobolka Bakool. Wafdiga Taliyaha ayaa waxaa degmada Waajid ku soo dhaweeyay saraakiil ka tirsan Ciidanka Xoogga, kuwaas oo warbixin ka siiyay xaaladda amni iyo guulaha laga gaaray dagaalka ka dhanka ah kooxaha Al-shabaab iyo Daacish. Ujeedka safarka Taliyaha ayaa ahaa dardargelinta howlgalada ka dhanka ah argagixisada iyo dhiirrigelinta geesiyaasha Ciidanka Xoogga Dalka, isagoo ku booriyay inay xoojiyaan dagaalada dalka looga ciribtirayo maleeshiyaadka Al-shabaab. Ugu dambeyntii, Taliyaha Ciidanka Xoogga Dalka Soomaaliyeed ayaa kulan gaar ah la yeeshay odayaasha dhaqanka ee degmada Waajid, isagoo sidoo kale noqday taliyihii ugu horreeyay ee kormeer shaqo ku taga magaaladaas. items.title: Aadan Madoobe Approved as JSP Party Candidate for South West Presidency
items.description: A sensitive meeting held last night at the Somali presidency resulted in a major decision to back the Speaker of the House of the People, Aadan Mohamed Nuur (Aadan Madoobe), as a candidate for the presidency of the South West State. The meeting also endorsed Hussein Sheikh Mohamed for the position of Secretary General of the JSP party, a move seen as reflecting his growing role in domestic politics, particularly regarding the South West elections. These decisions come as political competition intensifies and election preparations ramp up, heightening political activities in South West State and within the party led by Somalia’s President. Meanwhile, Speaker Aadan Madoobe is expected to travel to Baidoa, the capital of Bay region, where political organizing related to the election is already underway. Reports indicate that the Somali presidency seeks to reward Aadan Madoobe for his role in the constitutional amendment process, which is part of the broader strategy to support his candidacy. However, this plan is said to pose a significant challenge to the anticipated election in Baidoa, as numerous politicians remain dissatisfied with the current trajectory of events . The situation remains tense, with further reactions and developments expected in the coming days that could impact the direction of the South West State election.

items.title: SNA Commander Conducts First Official Inspection Visit to Waajid
items.description: The Commander of the Somali National Army, Brigadier General Ibrahim Mohamed Mahmoud, has carried out an official inspection visit to front-line positions held by government forces in Waajid, in the Bakool region. The delegation was received in Waajid by senior officers of the Somali National Army, who briefed the Commander on the prevailing security situation and recent operational gains against insurgent groups. The visit forms part of ongoing efforts to strengthen coordination, accelerate military operations, and sustain pressure on armed militants. During his engagement with troops, Brigadier General Ibrahim Mohamed Mahmoud called for the intensification of operations aimed at dismantling insurgent networks, stressing the need for continued discipline, operational effectiveness, and unity of command. He also commended the forces for their resilience and progress achieved under challenging conditions. In parallel, the Commander held consultations with traditional elders in Waajid, underscoring the importance of community cooperation in consolidating security gains and supporting stabilisation initiatives. Military officials indicated that the visit represents the first time a serving Commander of the Somali National Army has undertaken an operational inspection in Waajid, reflecting the growing strategic significance of the area within the broader security landscape. The post SNA Commander Conducts First Official Inspection Visit to Waajid appeared first on Raxanreeb Online .

items.title: Maxey tahay ujeedka uu guddoomiyaha golaha shacabka u tagay magaalada Baydhabo ?
items.description: Baydhabo ( Raxanreeb Online) Guddoomiyaha golaha shacabka Sheekh Aadan Madobe iyo wefdi uu hoggaaminayo, ayaa maanta gaaray magaalada Baydhabo ee xarunta KMG u ah maamulka Koonfur Galbeed. Guddoomiyaha iyo wefdigiisa, waxaa garoonka diyaaradaha ee Shaati Gaduud ku soo dhoweeyay hoggaamiyaha ku-meel-gaarka ah ee Koonfur Galbeed Jibriil Cabdirashiid Xaaji  iyo masuuliyiin ka tirsan dowladda, siyaasiyiin, iyo qeybaha kala duwan ee bulshada. Ujeeddada safarka wafdigan ayaa la xiriirta xoojinta wadatashiyada siyaasadeed iyo ka qeybgalka geeddi-socodka doorashooyinka ka socda Dowladda Koonfur Galbeed Soomaaliya. Hoggaamiye Jibrii, ayaa sheegay in maamulka Koonfur Galbeed ay ka go’an tahay qabsoomidda doorasho hufan, xor ah oo waafaqsan dastuurka, isla markaana ay soo dhoweynayso dhammaan musharraxiinta iyo daneeyayaasha siyaasadeed. Sidoo kale guddoomiye Aadan Madoobe, ayaa uga mahadceliyay mas’uuliyiinta iyo shacabka reer Baydhabo soo dhoweynta diirran, isagoo carrabka ku adkeeyay muhiimadda ay leedahay wada shaqeyn, midnimo, iyo xasillooni siyaasadeed si loo xaqiijiyo horumar waara. The post Maxey tahay ujeedka uu guddoomiyaha golaha shacabka u tagay magaalada Baydhabo ? appeared first on Raxanreeb Online .

items.title: Soomaaliya oo saxiixday heshiis lagu xoojinayo ilaalinta rayidka xiliga howlgalka
items.description: Muqdisho ( Raxanreeb Online) Dowladda Soomaaliya ayaa magaalada Muqdisho, ku qaabishay wafdi ka socday Xarunta Ilaalinta Rayidka ee Xilliyada Colaadaha (CIVIC), oo uu hoggaaminayay Agaasimaha Afrika ee hay’adda, Mudane Vianney Bisimwa. Kulanka intii uu socday, Wasiirka iyo Bisimwa ayaa kala saxiixday Heshiis Is-afgarad oo lagu xoojinayo wada-shaqeynta ku aaddan ilaalinta bed-qabka rayidka, yareynta waxyeellada rayidka xilliyada hawl-gallada ciidan, iyo horumarinta hab-raacyo waafaqsan xeerarka dalka iyo sharciga caalamiga ah ee bani’aadannimada. Heshiiskan ayaa taageeraya hirgelinta Siyaasadda Qaran ee Ilaalinta Bed-qabka Rayidka xilliyada Hawl-gallada Ciidan iyo Colaadaha Hubeysan, taas oo Soomaaliya ka dhigeysa dalkii ugu horreeyay Afrika ee dhaqan-geliya siyaasad noocan ah. Sidoo kale waxa kale oo uu heshiisku xoojinayaa tababarka, wacyigelinta iyo awood-dhiska Ciidamada Qalabka Sida, si loo xaqiijiyo in hawl-gallada loo fuliyo si waafaqsan sharciga, xirfad sare, taxaddar, isla-xisaabtan iyo ilaalinta karaamada rayidka. Wasiir Fiqi ayaa sheegay in Wasaaradda Gaashaandhigga ay mudnaan gaar ah siineyso ilaalinta bed-qabka rayidka, isagoo xusay in siyaasaddan ay ka tarjumeyso sida ay Dowladda Federaalka Soomaaliya uga go’an tahay in dhammaan hawl-gallada amniga lagu hago ilaalinta nolosha, karaamada, xuquuqda iyo bed-qabka shacabka Soomaaliyeed. Wasaaradda Gaashaandhigga waxaa ka go’an xoojinta ilaalinta bed-qabka rayidka, kor u qaadista kormeerka iyo isla-xisaabtanka hawl-gallada ciidan, iyo la-shaqeynta hay’adaha qaranka, bulshada rayidka iyo saaxiibbada caalamka, si dib-u-habeynta hay’adaha amniga Soomaaliya loogu saleeyo hannaan waafaqsan sharciga, isla markaana ku dhisan mas’uuliyad iyo kalsooni dadweyne. The post Soomaaliya oo saxiixday heshiis lagu xoojinayo ilaalinta rayidka xiliga howlgalka appeared first on Raxanreeb Online .

items.title: Sawirro: Aadan Madoobe oo ka dagay Baydhaba xilli la go’aamiyey madaxnimadiisa
items.description: Baydhabo (Caasimada Online) – Guddoomiyaha Baarlamaanka Soomaaliya, Sheekh Aadan Maxamed Nuur (Aadan Madoobe) iyo wafdi uu hoggaaminayo ayaa maanta gaaray magaalada Baydhabo ee xarunta goboka Baay, halkaas oo uu u tegay doorashada Maamulka Koonfur Galbeed. Aadan Madoobe oo ah musharraxa Xisbiga JSP ayaa si weyn loogu soo dhaweeyay magaalada, waxaana ka qayb-galay soo dhaweyntiisa hoggaamiyaha KMG ah ee maamulka, xildhibaanno, wasiirro iyo shacab. Guddoomiyaha oo hadal kooban siiyay warbaahinta ayaa u mahadceliyay madaxda iyo bulshada soo dhaweysay, wuxuuna ku baaqay in deganaan la muujiyo laga wada shaqeeyo amniga inta ay socoto qaban qaabada doorashada. Safarka Aadan Madoobe ee Baydhabo ayaa kusoo beegmaya xilli Villa Somalia ay dadaal xooggan ku bixineyso qaabeynta hoggaanka cusub ee Koonfur Galbeed, kadib markii madaxweynihii hore ee maamulkaas, Cabdicasiis Xasan Maxamed Laftagareen, uu xilka ka degay 30-kii Maarso, maalmo kaddib markii ciidamada dowladda federaalka ay galeen Baydhabo. Ilo-wareedyo siyaasadeed ayaa Caasimada Online u sheegay in Aadan Madoobe loo diyaarinayo inuu noqdo musharraxa ugu culus ee xilka Koonfur Galbeed, iyadoo qaar ka mid ah siyaasiyiinta maamulkaas ay u arkaan musharrax ay dhabarka ku wado Villa Somalia. Xogta ayaa intaas kusii dareysa in Xasan Sheekh uu ku qanciyey agaasimihii hore ee Villa Somalia, ahaana saaxiib aad ugu dhow, Xuseen Sheekh Maxamuud inuu tratnka uga haro Aadan Madoobe, ayada oo si kale loo qanciyey. Arrintan ayaa tartanka ka dhigeysa mid aan u muuqan mid furan, gaar ahaan maadaama Baydhaba ay hadda ku jirto marxalad kala-guur ah oo dowladda federaalka ay saameyn xooggan ku leedahay. Si kastaba, Dhaq-dhaqaaqyada ka socda Baydhaba iyo hakadka ku jira isku-shaandheynta xukuumadda ayaa muujinaya in Villa Somalia ay hadda mudnaanta siineyso xakameynta siyaasadda Koonfur Galbeed, kahor inta aysan qaadin tallaabooyin kale oo gudaha xukuumadda ah. The post Sawirro: Aadan Madoobe oo ka dagay Baydhaba xilli la go’aamiyey madaxnimadiisa appeared first on Caasimada Online .

The post Sawirro: Aadan Madoobe oo ka dagay Baydhaba xilli la go’aamiyey madaxnimadiisa appeared first on Caasimada Online .

items.title: Somalia Moves to Lock Down Cyber Threats as New Security Framework Takes Shape
items.description: Somalia’s telecoms regulator has launched a major push to shield the nation’s expanding digital space from cyber threats, holding a high‑level consultation to design a comprehensive risk management and compliance blueprint. The National Communications Authority (NCA) brought together key government bodies, private sector players, universities, civil society groups, and technical specialists in Mogadishu on 25 April. The goal: to gather wide‑ranging input for the draft Cybersecurity Risk Management and Compliance Framework, which will set rules for identifying risks, enforcing compliance, and assigning institutional duties. NCA Director General Mustafa Yasin Sheikh urged stakeholders to scrutinize the draft closely. “We encourage all stakeholders to take the time to carefully review the document, analyze it in detail, and provide thoughtful input on each component,” he said. Opening the meeting, the State Minister of Communications and Technology, H.E. MP Ahmed Osman Dirie, noted that as technology spreads into education, business, and daily life, safeguards must keep pace. “Without proper safeguards, these advancements can pose risks. Establishing a robust cybersecurity risk management and compliance framework is essential, and the National Communications Authority is mandated to lead this effort on behalf of the government,” he stated. Participants discussed how to spot emerging cyber threats, design effective regulatory compliance mechanisms, and clarify who does what across sectors. The finalized framework is expected to become a cornerstone of Somalia’s national cybersecurity governance, helping build a more resilient digital ecosystem. The NCA says feedback from the consultation will now be used to complete the framework.

items.title: Soomaliya iyo Cumaan oo kawada hadley xoojinta iskaashiga labada dal
items.description: Cumaan ( Raxanreeb Online) Wasiirka Wasaaradda Arrimaha Dibadda Soomaaliya Cabdisalaan Cabdi Cali ayaa wadahadallo la yeeshay Sayid Badr bin Hamad Al Busaidi, Wasiirka Arrimaha Dibadda ee Saldanadda Cumaan, kulan ka dhacay xarunta Wasaaradda ee magaalada Muscat, intii uu ku guda jiray booqasho rasmi ah oo uu ku tagay dalkaas. Wadahadallada ayey Wasiirradu diiradda ku saareen xoojinta xiriirka laba geesoodka ah iyo horumarinta iskaashiga, si loo adkeeyo iskaashiga soo jireenka ah iyo danaha wadaagga ah ee labada dal ee walaalaha ah. Sidoo kale, labada dhinac ayaa is dhaafsaday aragtiyo ku saabsan xaaladaha gobolka, gaar ahaan Geeska Afrika, iyagoo adkeeyay muhiimadda ay leedahay iskaashi heer gobol iyo heer caalami ah oo lagu horumarinayo amniga, xasilloonida, iyo horumar waara. Wasiirka Arrimaha Dibadda ee Cumaan, Sayid Badr Al Busaidi, ayaa mar kale xaqiijiyay taageerada adag ee dalkiisa uu u hayo midnimada, madax bannaanida, iyo wadajirka dhuleed ee Jamhuuriyadda Federaalka Soomaaliya, isagoo sidoo kale waxaa uu caddeeyay mowqifka Cumaan ee ah in aan la aqoonsan karin wax kasta oo ka baxsan nidaamka dowladeed ee Soomaaliya. Dhankiisa, Wasiir Cabdisalaan,ayaa uga mahadceliyay Boqortooyadda Cumaan doorka diblomaasiyadeed ee wax ku oolka ah iyo dadaallada ay ku bixiso dhiirrigelinta wada hadalada, dib u heshiisiinta, iyo xasilloonida gobolka. The post Soomaliya iyo Cumaan oo kawada hadley xoojinta iskaashiga labada dal appeared first on Raxanreeb Online .

items.title: Xogta shaqsigii weerarka fulay iyo Trump oo si kale uga….
items.description: Washington ( Raxanreeb Online) Ninka lagu tuhunsan yahay weerarka toogashada ayaa lagu sheegay inuu yahay Cole Tomas Allen, oo 31 jir ah kana soo jeeda Torrance, California, sida ay sheegtay CBS oo ah la-hawlgalaha wararka Waqooyiga Ameerika. Donald Trump ayaa sheegay in FBI-da iyo Sirdoonka ay fulinayaan amarro baaritaan oo ka socda cinwaan ku yaalla California. Taliyaha ku-meelgaarka ah ee booliiska Washington DC, Jeffery W Carroll, ayaa sheegay in eedeysanuhu uu ahaa marti deggan hoteelka lagu qabanayay munaasabadda, isla markaana uusan jirin sabab loo aaminsan yahay in qof kale uu halis ku jiro. Inkasta oo hay’adaha ammaanku xaqiijiyeen in rasaas la riday, haddana lama oga tirada saxda ah. Booliiska ayaa sheegay in ay rasaas isweydaarsadeen eedeysanaha iyo saraakiisha ammaanka. Carroll ayaa sheegay in eedeysanaha uu “ku hubeysnaa qori, bastoolad, iyo mindiyo badan”. Jeanine Pirro, oo ah xeer ilaaliyaha Mareykanka ee Washington, ayaa sheegtay in eedeysanaha wajahayo laba dacwadood oo la xiriira adeegsiga hub intii lagu guda jiray fal rabshado ah, iyo weerar lagu qaaday saraakiil federaal ah iyadoo la adeegsanayo hub halis ah. Waxay intaas ku dartay in si rasmi ah dacwad loogu soo oogi doono Isniinta. Sababta ka dambeysa weerarka wali ma cadda, balse Trump ayaa sheegay inuu rajeynayo inuu bixiyo war cusub Axadda maanta ah. Madaxweynaha Mareykanka Donald Trump ayaa sheegay in rasaastii ka dhacday cashadii aqalka xilli lagu guda aysan ka joojin doonin qorshihiisa dagaal uu la galo Iran, inkastoo uu aaminsan yahay in dhacdadu u badan tahay inaysan xiriir la lahayn arrintaas. The post Xogta shaqsigii weerarka fulay iyo Trump oo si kale uga…. appeared first on Raxanreeb Online .

items.title: Hay’adda Isgaarsiinta Qaranka oo Qabatay Kulan Wadatashi oo ku saabsan Hanaanka Maareynta Khataraha iyo Habraaca U-hoggaansanaanta Amniga Saaybarka
items.description: Hay’adda Isgaarsiinta Qaranka oo Qabatay Kulan Wadatashi oo ku saabsan Hanaanka Maareynta Khataraha iyo Habraaca U-hoggaansanaanta Amniga Saaybarka Muqdisho, Soomaaliya – 25 Abriil 2026 — Hay’adda Isgaarsiinta Qaranka (HIQ) ayaa qabatay kulan wadatashi qaran ah si loo horumariyo Qaab-dhismeedka Maareynta Khataraha iyo Habraaca U-hoggaansanaanta Amniga Saaybarka, kaas oo ay kasoo qeyb galeen wakiilo ka socda hay’adaha dowladda, bahda waxbarashada, shirkadaha gaarka loo leeyahay, bulshada rayidka iyo khubaro farsamo. Kulankan ayaa ujeeddadiisu ahayd in la helo talooyin iyo aragtiyo lagu horumarinayo hannaan dhammaystiran oo xoojiya amniga saaybarka dalka, ilaaliya kaabeyaasha dhijitaalka ah ee muhiimka ah, isla markaana xaqiijiya maareynta khataraha iyo u-hoggaansanaan wax ku ool ah oo ka dhex jirta dhammaan qaybaha. Isagoo ka hadlay kulanka, Maareeyaha Guud ee Hay’adda Isgaarsiinta Qaranka, Mudane Mustafa Yaasin Sheekh, ayaa ka hadlay muhiimadda in si qoto dheer loo eego dukumentiyada: “Waxaan ku dhiirrigelinaynaa dhammaan daneeyayaasha inay waqti geliyaan, si taxaddar leh u eegaan dukumentiyadan, si qoto dheer u falanqeeyaan, una soo gudbiyaan aragtiyo dhammaystiran oo ku saabsan qodob kasta.” Wasiiru Dowlaha Wasaaradda Isgaarsiinta iyo Teknoolojiyadda, Mudane Xildhibaan Axmed Diiriye, oo si rasmi ah u furay kulanka, ayaa muujiyay muhiimadda sii kordheysa ee amniga saaybarka xilli ay teknoolojiyaddu si weyn u saameyneyso nolosha: “Adeegsiga teknoolojiyadda waa mid si joogto ah u kobcaya, wuxuuna saameyn ku leeyahay dhinacyo badan oo nolosha ah sida waxbarashada iyo ganacsiga. Haddii aan laga gaashaaman, horumarradu waxay keeni karaan khataro. Sidaa darteed, dejinta hannaanka maareynta khataraha iyo habraaca u-hoggaansanaanta amniga saaybarka waa mid muhiim ah. Hay’adda Isgaarsiinta Qaranka ayaa loo xilsaaray inay hoggaamiso dadaalkan iyada oo matalaysa dowladda.” Kulanka ayaa muujiyay muhiimadda ay leedahay in la xoojiyo iskaashiga hay’adaha si loo wajaho khataraha sii kordhaya ee saaybarka loona dhiso nidaam dhijitaal ah oo adkaysi leh. Ka qaybgalayaashu waxay ka doodeen aqoonsiga khataraha, habraacyada u-hoggaansanaanta, iyo doorka hay’adaha kala duwan. Natiijooyinka ka soo baxa kulankan wadatashiga ah ayaa gacan ka geysan doona dhammeystirka hannaanka Maareynta Khataraha iyo Habraaca U-hoggaansanaanta Amniga Saaybarka, kaas oo door muhiim ah ka qaadan doona xoojinta amniga dhijitaalka ah ee dalka.

items.title: Wararkii u dambeeyey isku day la doonayey in lagu dilo Trump iyo toogasho dhacday
items.description: Washington – Madaxweynaha Mareykanka Donald Trump ayaa sheegay inuu badqabo kaddib markii nin hubeysan oo looga shakisan yahay inuu weerar damacsanaa uu rasaas ka furay agagaarka goobta ay ka socotay Casho-sharafeedka Wariyeyaasha Aqalka Cad (White House Correspondents’ Dinner). Arrintan ayaa ku qasabtay ciidamada ilaalada madaxda ee Secret Service inay si degdeg ah goobta uga saaraan madaxweynaha, marwada koowaad Melania Trump iyo mas’uuliyiin sare oo ka tirsan dowladda, xilli ay ka qayb-galayeen mid ka mid ah munaasabadaha sanadlaha ah ee ugu caansan magaalada Washington. Trump ayaa habeenkii Sabtida fadhiyay masraxa hoteelka Washington Hilton, isagoo ay weheliyeen Madaxweyne Ku-xigeenka JD Vance, afhayeenka Aqalka Cad Karoline Leavitt iyo mas’uuliyiin ka tirsan ururka wariyeyaasha Aqalka Cad, markii si lama filaan ah loo maqlay dhawaqa rasaas xooggan xilli martidu ay ku guda jireen cunteynta hoolka weyn ee munaasabadda. Madaxweynaha ayaa dib ka sheegay in markii hore uu u qaatay in saxan weyn uu dhacay maadaama dhawaqu ula muuqday mid “aad u fog,” balse wuxuu xusay in marwada koowaad ay si degdeg ah u dareentay khatarta. “Waxaan u malaynayaa inay markiiba ogaatay waxa dhacay,” ayuu Trump u sheegay suxufiyiinta isagoo ku sugan Aqalka Cad, wuxuuna xusuustay in Melania Trump ay ku tiri: “Kani waa dhawaq xun.” Trump ayaa sheegay in ciidamada ilaalada ay si degdeg ah uga dejiyeen masraxa. Wuxuu xaqiijiyay in ciidamadu ay qabteen shakhsigii laga shakiyay, isla markaana hal askari oo ka tirsan ilaalada gaarka ah uu ka badbaaday xabbad meel dhow lagaga dhuftay jaakaddiisa xabadda celiysa. “Waxaa masaafo aad u dhow lagaga toogtay qori aad u awood badan, jaakadduna shaqadeedii ayay qabatay,” ayuu yiri Trump. Eedeysanaha ayaa magaciisa lagu sheegay Cole Allen, oo 31 jir ah, kana soo jeeda Torrance, California, sida ay sheegeen laba sarkaal oo ka tirsan hay’adaha amniga oo xog-ogaal u ah baaritaanka. Booliska ayaa sheegay in Allen uu marti ka ahaa hoteelka Washington Hilton, halkaas oo munaasabadda lagu qabtay, isla markaana uu watay qori, bastoolad iyo mindiyo. Mas’uuliyiintu ma aysan shaacin sabab suuragal ah, mana aysan sheegin in uu lahaa bartilmaameed gaar ah. Dadaal baan u galay inaan sii joogo Toogashada ayaa carqaladeysay casho-sharaf kulmisay mas’uuliyiin sare oo dowladeed, wariyeyaal, madaxda shirkadaha ganacsiga iyo dad caan ah oo isugu yimid hal hool. Trump ayaa sheegay inuusan doonayn in munaasabaddu ay soo dhammaato, wuxuuna ku adkaystay inuu sii joogo in kasta oo ay u jirtay qaylo-dhaan amni. “Aad baan ugu dagaallamay si aan u sii joogo,” ayuu yiri. Qoraal uu goor sii horreysay soo dhigay baraha bulshada, ayuu Trump ku ammaanay ciidamada ilaalada gaarka ah iyo kuwa fulinta sharciga, isagoo sheegay inay “qaadeen tallaabo degdeg ah iyo geesinimo leh.” Wuxuu xusay inuu soo jeediyay in munaasabadda la sii wado, balse uu ugu dambayn raacay awaamiirta laamaha amniga. Madaxweynaha ayaa markii dambe caddeeyay in qaban-qaabiyeyaashu ay dhowaan dib u muddeyn doonaan cashada. Trump wuxuu sheegay inuu doonayay in fiidkaasi uu sii socdo maadaama uusan doonayn in “dad xanuunsan” ay “beddelaan nidaamka nolosheena.” Balse saraakiisha amniga ayaa ku amray martida inay isaga baxaan dhismaha. Hoolka weyn ayaa si tartiib-tartiib ah u faaruqay iyadoo dadku ay dul marayeen khamri daatay, masaxado daadsan iyo cuntooyin aan la dhammaysan. Argagax ka dhashay gudaha hoolka Goobjoogayaal ayaa ka warramay argagax soo wajahay dadkii ku sugnaa gudaha hoolka markii dhawaqa rasaastu uu isqabsaday goobta, iyadoo martidu ay gabaad ka dhigteen miisaska hoostooda. Erin Thielman, oo ah haweeney horay uga tirsanaan jirtay milateriga oo dibadda uga baxday hoolka si ay u wacdo wiilkeeda, ayaa sheegtay inay maqashay saddex dhawaq oo xooggan oo ay u qaadatay inay ahaayeen rasaas. Waxay sheegtay inay aragtay nin horteeda ku dhacay kaas oo u muuqday inuu watay qori iyo kaydadka rasaasta. Kaddib waxay u dhaadhacday dabaqa hoose, iyadoo aragtay saraakiil amni oo soo saaraya bistooladahooda. Haweeney kabalyeeri ah oo gabaad raadsanaysay ayaa afka Isbaanishka ku ooysay iyadoo leh: “Ma doonayo inaan halkan ku dhinto. Ma doonayo inaan qolkan ku dhinto.” Martida ayaa hoos u foorarsaday miisaska hoostooda iyadoo ciidamada Secret Service-ka iyo saraakiisha kale ee amniga ay dhex ordayeen goobta. Trump ayaa sheegay in shakhsiga weerarka soo qaaday uusan marnaba u soo dhowaan isaga, uuna ku guuldareystay inuu ka soo gudbo albaabka laga galo hoolka weyn. Madaxweynaha ayaa sheegay inuu sii deeyay muuqaallada kamaradaha amniga ee dhacdadan si loo muujiyo “hufnaan”, loona tuso sida xawliga ah ee ay ciidamada amnigu u dhaqaaqeen. Muuqaalka ayaa muujinayay nin si xawli ah ku dhaafaya qalabka baarista biraha iyo saraakiisha amniga, kuwaas oo qoryahooda ku fiiqay ka hor inta aysan ka bixin shaashadda. Su’aalo ka dhashay sugidda amniga Trump ayaa xaqiijiyay in ninka la qabtay uu watay hub kala duwan kahor inta aysan ciidamada ilaalada joojin. Wuxuu sheegay in saraakiishu ay dib ka ogaan karaan ujeeddada rasmiga ah, balse wuxuu tilmaamay in ninku u muuqday mid kaligiis socday. “Waxay u maleynayaan inuu yahay gacan-ku-dhiigle keligiis ah, aniguna sidaas ayaan aaminsanahay,” ayuu yiri Trump, isagoo ku daray in ninkaasi uu ka yimid gobolka California. Madaxweyne Trump wuxuu sheegay inuusan helin wax xog amni ah oo ku saabsan khatar gaar ah kahor cashada. Dhacdadan ayaa si degdeg ah u dhalisay su’aalo ku aaddan amniga kulankan sanadlaha ah ee qol qura isugu keena madaxda ugu sarraysa siyaasadda, dowladda iyo warbaahinta. Trump ayaa ku baaqay in la adkeeyo ilaalinta, isagoo yiri: “Maanta, waxaan u baahannahay heerar ammaan oo laga yaabo inaan horay loo arag.” Wuxuu sidoo kale xusay in dhacdadani ay tusaale u tahay sababta Aqalka Cad uu ugu baahan yahay amni xooggan iyo hoolkiisa u gaarka ah, isagoo soo hadal-qaaday hool haatan laga dhisayo madaxtooyada. “Kani ma ahayn dhisme si gaar ah ammaan u ah,” ayuu Trump ka yiri hoteelka Washington Hilton. Taariikh madow ee Washington Hilton Hoteelka Washington Hilton oo dhaca waqooyi-galbeed Washington, una jira qiyaastii hal mayl iyo bar Aqalka Cad, ayaa leh taariikh murugo leh marka la eego madaxweynayaasha Mareykanka. Madaxweyne Ronald Reagan ayaa bannaanka hoteelkan lagu toogtay sanadkii 1981-kii, weerar uu fuliyay John Hinckley Jr. Reagan wuu ka badbaaday dhacdadaas, balse weerarkaas waxaa ku dhaawacmay saddex qof oo kale, oo uu ku jiray afhayeenkii Aqalka Cad James Brady. Dhacdadii habeenkii Sabtida ayaa sidoo kale soo cusbooneysiisay xusuusta laba isku-day khaarajin oo lala eegtay Trump intii lagu jiray ololihii doorashada 2024. Bishii Luulyo 2024, Trump oo in ka yar 10 daqiiqo ka hadlayay isu-soo-bax doorasho oo ka dhacay Butler, Pennsylvania, ayaa waxaa rasaas ku furay nin 20 jir ah oo ku sugnaa saqafka kore ee dhisme u jiray qiyaastii 400 oo cagood. Xabbad ayaa Trump kaga dhacday dhegta. Ninka hubeysan ayaa dilay hal qof oo ka qaybgalayay isu-soo-baxa, wuxuuna dhaawacay laba kale. Bishii Sebtembar 2024, Trump ayaa wajahnay khatar kale kaddib markii nin uu qori ka soo dhex taagay deyrka garoonkiisa Golf-ka ee gobolka Florida xilli uu halkaas ku sugnaa. Ciidamada ilaalada ayaa rasaas ku furay ninkaas, saraakiishana goor dambe ayay xireen. Trump ayaa sheegay in falcelintii amniga ee habeenkii Sabtida ka dhacday Washington Hilton ay ka xoog badneyd tii ka dhacday Butler. Wuxuu xusay in isaga aragtidiisa, ciidamada Secret Service-ka ay cashadaas ka sameeyeen “shaqo ka wanaagsan” tii ay ka qabteen isu-soo-baxii Pennsylvania. ‘Dadka ugu saameynta badan’ Markii la weydiiyay sababta isku-dayada khaarajinta ay si isdaba joog ah ugu dhacayaan isaga, Trump wuxuu sheegay inuu darsay dilalka siyaasadeed. “Waan darsay khaarajinta madaxda,” ayuu yiri, isagoo soo jeediyay in hoggaamiyeyaasha sameeya “saameynta ugu weyn,” sida Abraham Lincoln, ay inta badan noqdaan bartilmaameedyo cadowtooyo. “Aad baan u necbahay inaan iraahdo waa arrin aan sharaf u arko, balse wax badan ayaan qabannay,” ayuu yiri Trump. Munaasabadda Casho-sharafeedka Wariyeyaasha Aqalka Cad ayaa weli ah mid ka mid ah dhacdooyinka sanadlaha ah ee ugu muhiimsan magaalada Washington, taas oo dhaqan ahaan ay ka soo qaybgalaan madaxweynayaasha, wariyeyaasha, siyaasiyiinta iyo dadka caanka ah. Sabtidii ayaa u ahayd markii ugu horreysay ee Trump uu ka soo muuqdo cashadan tan iyo sanadkii 2015-kii. Kama uusan qaybgelin intii uu ku jiray muddo-xileedkiisii koowaad. Mas’uuliyiinta sare ee maamulka ee ka qaybgalay cashadan waxaa ka mid ahaa Xoghayaha Arrimaha Dibadda Marco Rubio iyo Xoghayaha Difaaca Pete Hegseth. Trump ayaa dhacdadan ku tilmaamay mid “gebi ahaanba naxdin leh” balse wuxuu ku adkaystay in aysan ka hor istaagi doonin inuu fagaaraha kasoo muuqdo mar kale. “Si fudud, waa inaan mar kale sameynaa arrintan,” ayuu kusoo xiray hadalkiisa. The post Wararkii u dambeeyey isku day la doonayey in lagu dilo Trump iyo toogasho dhacday appeared first on Caasimada Online .
items.fullContent: Washington – Madaxweynaha Mareykanka Donald Trump ayaa sheegay inuu badqabo kaddib markii nin hubeysan oo looga shakisan yahay inuu weerar damacsanaa uu rasaas ka furay agagaarka goobta ay ka socotay Casho-sharafeedka Wariyeyaasha Aqalka Cad (White House Correspondents’ Dinner). Arrintan ayaa ku qasabtay ciidamada ilaalada madaxda ee Secret Service inay si degdeg ah goobta uga saaraan madaxweynaha, marwada koowaad Melania Trump iyo mas’uuliyiin sare oo ka tirsan dowladda, xilli ay ka qayb-galayeen mid ka mid ah munaasabadaha sanadlaha ah ee ugu caansan magaalada Washington. Trump ayaa habeenkii Sabtida fadhiyay masraxa hoteelka Washington Hilton, isagoo ay weheliyeen Madaxweyne Ku-xigeenka JD Vance, afhayeenka Aqalka Cad Karoline Leavitt iyo mas’uuliyiin ka tirsan ururka wariyeyaasha Aqalka Cad, markii si lama filaan ah loo maqlay dhawaqa rasaas xooggan xilli martidu ay ku guda jireen cunteynta hoolka weyn ee munaasabadda. Madaxweynaha ayaa dib ka sheegay in markii hore uu u qaatay in saxan weyn uu dhacay maadaama dhawaqu ula muuqday mid “aad u fog,” balse wuxuu xusay in marwada koowaad ay si degdeg ah u dareentay khatarta. “Waxaan u malaynayaa inay markiiba ogaatay waxa dhacay,” ayuu Trump u sheegay suxufiyiinta isagoo ku sugan Aqalka Cad, wuxuuna xusuustay in Melania Trump ay ku tiri: “Kani waa dhawaq xun.” Trump ayaa sheegay in ciidamada ilaalada ay si degdeg ah uga dejiyeen masraxa. Wuxuu xaqiijiyay in ciidamadu ay qabteen shakhsigii laga shakiyay, isla markaana hal askari oo ka tirsan ilaalada gaarka ah uu ka badbaaday xabbad meel dhow lagaga dhuftay jaakaddiisa xabadda celiysa. “Waxaa masaafo aad u dhow lagaga toogtay qori aad u awood badan, jaakadduna shaqadeedii ayay qabatay,” ayuu yiri Trump. Eedeysanaha ayaa magaciisa lagu sheegay Cole Allen, oo 31 jir ah, kana soo jeeda Torrance, California, sida ay sheegeen laba sarkaal oo ka tirsan hay’adaha amniga oo xog-ogaal u ah baaritaanka. Booliska ayaa sheegay in Allen uu marti ka ahaa hoteelka Washington Hilton, halkaas oo munaasabadda lagu qabtay, isla markaana uu watay qori, bastoolad iyo mindiyo. Mas’uuliyiintu ma aysan shaacin sabab suuragal ah, mana aysan sheegin in uu lahaa bartilmaameed gaar ah. Dadaal baan u galay inaan sii joogo Toogashada ayaa carqaladeysay casho-sharaf kulmisay mas’uuliyiin sare oo dowladeed, wariyeyaal, madaxda shirkadaha ganacsiga iyo dad caan ah oo isugu yimid hal hool. Trump ayaa sheegay inuusan doonayn in munaasabaddu ay soo dhammaato, wuxuuna ku adkaystay inuu sii joogo in kasta oo ay u jirtay qaylo-dhaan amni. “Aad baan ugu dagaallamay si aan u sii joogo,” ayuu yiri. Qoraal uu goor sii horreysay soo dhigay baraha bulshada, ayuu Trump ku ammaanay ciidamada ilaalada gaarka ah iyo kuwa fulinta sharciga, isagoo sheegay inay “qaadeen tallaabo degdeg ah iyo geesinimo leh.” Wuxuu xusay inuu soo jeediyay in munaasabadda la sii wado, balse uu ugu dambayn raacay awaamiirta laamaha amniga. Madaxweynaha ayaa markii dambe caddeeyay in qaban-qaabiyeyaashu ay dhowaan dib u muddeyn doonaan cashada. Trump wuxuu sheegay inuu doonayay in fiidkaasi uu sii socdo maadaama uusan doonayn in “dad xanuunsan” ay “beddelaan nidaamka nolosheena.” Balse saraakiisha amniga ayaa ku amray martida inay isaga baxaan dhismaha. Hoolka weyn ayaa si tartiib-tartiib ah u faaruqay iyadoo dadku ay dul marayeen khamri daatay, masaxado daadsan iyo cuntooyin aan la dhammaysan. Argagax ka dhashay gudaha hoolka Goobjoogayaal ayaa ka warramay argagax soo wajahay dadkii ku sugnaa gudaha hoolka markii dhawaqa rasaastu uu isqabsaday goobta, iyadoo martidu ay gabaad ka dhigteen miisaska hoostooda. Erin Thielman, oo ah haweeney horay uga tirsanaan jirtay milateriga oo dibadda uga baxday hoolka si ay u wacdo wiilkeeda, ayaa sheegtay inay maqashay saddex dhawaq oo xooggan oo ay u qaadatay inay ahaayeen rasaas. Waxay sheegtay inay aragtay nin horteeda ku dhacay kaas oo u muuqday inuu watay qori iyo kaydadka rasaasta. Kaddib waxay u dhaadhacday dabaqa hoose, iyadoo aragtay saraakiil amni oo soo saaraya bistooladahooda. Haweeney kabalyeeri ah oo gabaad raadsanaysay ayaa afka Isbaanishka ku ooysay iyadoo leh: “Ma doonayo inaan halkan ku dhinto. Ma doonayo inaan qolkan ku dhinto.” Martida ayaa hoos u foorarsaday miisaska hoostooda iyadoo ciidamada Secret Service-ka iyo saraakiisha kale ee amniga ay dhex ordayeen goobta. Trump ayaa sheegay in shakhsiga weerarka soo qaaday uusan marnaba u soo dhowaan isaga, uuna ku guuldareystay inuu ka soo gudbo albaabka laga galo hoolka weyn. Madaxweynaha ayaa sheegay inuu sii deeyay muuqaallada kamaradaha amniga ee dhacdadan si loo muujiyo “hufnaan”, loona tuso sida xawliga ah ee ay ciidamada amnigu u dhaqaaqeen. Muuqaalka ayaa muujinayay nin si xawli ah ku dhaafaya qalabka baarista biraha iyo saraakiisha amniga, kuwaas oo qoryahooda ku fiiqay ka hor inta aysan ka bixin shaashadda. items.title: Koonfur Afrika oo Ciidan Milatari u Dirtay Gobollo Dambiyo Ka Sii Kordhayaan.
items.description: Ciidanka milatariga Koonfur Afrika oo loo diray xaafadaha si dambiyada loola dagaallamo Madaxweynaha dalka South Africa, Cyril Ramaphosa, ayaa go’aan adag qaatay ka dib markii uu u adkeysan waayay dambiyada iyo dilalka maalin kasta ka dhaca dalkaas. Madaxweynaha ayaa ansixiyay in ciidanka qaranka (milatariga) ay gudaha dalka soo galaan si ay u caawiyaan booliska oo ku dhibaataysan xakameynta kooxaha hubeysan. Ciidamadan ayaa hadda bilaabay howlgallo laga fulinayo gobollada ugu dhibka badan sida Johannesburg iyo Cape Town. Waxa ay si gaar ah u beegsanayaan kooxaha baadda dadka ka qaata, kuwa macdanta sida sharcidarrada ah u qota, iyo burcadda abaabulan ee dhibka ku haysa shacabka. Koonfur Afrika waxay hadda mareysaa heer aad u khatar ah, iyadoo tobanaan qof maalin kasta dalkaas lagu dilo. Dowladda waxay leedahay ciidanka in la keeno waa nafiskii ugu dambeeyay ee shacabku ku heli karaan ammaan. Si kastaba ha ahaatee, waxaa jira walaac laga qabo in askarta milatariga aysan aqoon u lahayn sida loola macaamilo dadka shacabka ah, maadaama loogu talagalay dagaal balse aan loogu talagalay shaqo boolis. Khubarada qaar waxay qabaan in milatariga la keeno ay tahay xal ku meel gaar ah, balse loo baahan yahay in sirdoonka la xoojiyo si looga takhaluso madaxda kooxaha dambiyada ee magaalada dhexdeeda ku dhuumaaleysanaya.

items.title: Maxaa gaar ka dhigay Caleema-saarkii maanta ee Ugaaska Guud ee beesha Murusade?
items.description: Caleema-saarkii Ugaaska Guud ee Beesha Murusade: Maxaa ka duwanaa xafladihii hore, maxayse ka dhigan tahay saameynta uu yeeshay? MUQDISHO — Magaalada Muqdisho ayaa maanta martigelisay munaasabad taariikhi ah oo si weyn looga dareemay guud ahaan dalka, taas oo lagu caleema saaray Ugaaska Guud ee beesha Murusade, Ugaas Cabdirisaaq Ugaas Cabdullaahi Ugaas Xaashi Faracadde . Xafladdan oo diyaargarowgeedu socday muddo bilooyin ah, ayaa noqotay mid indhaha dadweynaha iyo falanqeeyayaashaba soo jiidatay qaabka casriga ah ee loo agaasimay. Kulankii “Muxaafid iyo Mucaarad”: Midnimo ka baxsan Siyaasadda Waxa ugu weyn ee munaasabaddan ka dhigay mid gaar ah ayaa ahayd heerka ka-qeybgalka. Madasha waxaa ku wada sugnaa madaxda ugu sarreysa dowladda Federaalka, siyaasiyiinta mucaaradka ugu miisaanka culus, safiirro, iyo wufuud ka timid deegaannada Soomaalidu degto ee ka baxsan xudduudda, sida magaalada Jigjiga. Joogitaanka dhinacyada isku haya siyaasadda dalka ee hal masrax ayaa loo arkaa guul weyn oo u soo hoyatay hoggaanka dhaqanka, taas oo muujinaysa in weli dhaqanku yahay halka keliya ee ay ku kulmi karaan qalbiyada dadka isku diiddan masiirka dalka. Saameyn miyuu u geystay aragtida casriga ah ee Dhaqanka? Caleema-saarka Ugaas Cabdirisaaq ma uusan ahayn mid dhaqameed oo qura, balse wuxuu xambaarsanaa fariimo dhowr ah oo saameyn leh: Ugaaska oo ah aqoonyahán dhallinyaro ah, waxay rajo gelinaysaa jiilka cusub ee raba inay arkaan dhaqanka oo la jaanqaadaya casriga, kana fog qabyaaladda caadifadda ku dhisan.Qaabka loo dhisay teendhada xafladda iyo nidaamka guud ee goobta ayaa muujiyay in Soomaaliya ay awood u leedahay qabashada munaasabado heer caalami ah oo nidaamsan.Khudbadihii laga jeediyay madasha ayaa dhamaantood ku qotoma baahida loo qabo is-cafis iyo in loo midoobo danaha guud ee qaranka. Ugaaska iyo Caqabadaha Hor yaalla Ugaas Cabdirisaaq oo hadalka qaatay ayaa qiray in xilkan uu yahay mid culus, balse uu diyaar u yahay inuu noqdo buundada isku xirta qaybaha bulshada. Falanqeeyayaasha ayaa aaminsan in doorka Ugaaska cusub uu muhiim u noqon doono xasilloonida siyaasadeed ee Muqdisho iyo deegaannada kale, maadaama uu yahay hoggaamiye ay u hoggaansan yihiin qaybaha kala duwan ee bulshada uu matalo.
